privileged_info_summary: The 'Exam Anxiety' dataset is a canonical statistics dataset. Computing the Pearson partial correlation between 'Exam' and 'Anxiety' controlling for 'Revise' yields a correlation coefficient of -0.247 with a p-value of 0.012, confirming the relationship is statistically significant ('Yes'). The final output must include an OMV project file over 5000 bytes located at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety_PartialCorr.omv' and a text report at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/partial_correlation_report.txt' documenting these exact results.
